title: erigeron subtrinervis
intro: Erigeron subtrinervis, also known as the 'Mountain Daisy', is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce pain. Erigeron subtrinervis is believed to have a range of health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
